locator.quote: Agent-learned stop-loss requires the policy to develop the

text: Agent-learned stop-loss requires the policy to develop the 'if MTM bleeding past £X, close' abstraction before positive cash signal arrives — the same chicken-and-egg the rewrite hit.

locator.quote: the abstraction structural; the policy learns when *not*

text: An env-side auto-close makes the abstraction structural; the policy learns when NOT to open instead of when to close.
The env-initiated stop-close is distinct from force-close: it's mid-race (not T−N), targeted (not blanket), and uses the strict matcher (not relaxed).
